action: Click on the Photoshop icon (Adobe Photoshop) on the taskbar or start menu to open the application. If not visible, open the Start menu and search for Photoshop, then open the Photoshop application.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps:
